name: io.github.protoLabsAI/mythxengine
title: MythxEngine
description: Tabletop RPG engine over MCP: dice, combat, stress, clocks, world generation, four bundled worlds

environmentVariables.name: RPG_MCP_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Where sessions and world packs are stored (default: ~/.mythxengine/data)

_comment: fileSha256 fill-in: after the release workflow runs, copy the hash from the mcpb-sha256.txt release asset (printed by the 'Build .mcpb bundle' step in .github/workflows/release.yml), update the identifier URL to the tagged release, then publish with mcp-publisher (npm ownership is verified via the mcpName field in packages/mcp-server/package.json). The hash is per-release: it MUST be refreshed on every version bump — until then the value below still belongs to the previous release's .mcpb.
